studyName: Integrated Epigenetic Maps of Human Embryonic, Extraembryonic and Adult Cells

tables.description: Sample ID, anatomic site where sample was collected, analyte type, tumor status, cell or tissue type or subtype of sample, the name of the company, laboratory or person that provided the biological material, markers used to isolate and identify the cell type, the conditions under which the primary cell was cultured, the protocol for collecting the primary tissue, the number of times the cells have been re-plated and allowed to grow back to confluency or to some maximum density if using suspension cultures, the medium in which the cell line has been grown, the stage in cell differentiation to which the cell line belongs, the protocol used to differentiate the cell line, batch from which the sample was derived of participants involved in the "Integrated Epigenetic Maps of Human Embryonic, Extraembryonic and Adult Cells" project.

variables.name: ANATOMIC_SITE
variables.description: Anatomic site where sample was collected

variables.name: BATCH
variables.description: Batch from which the sample was derived

variables.name: BIOMATERIAL_PROVIDER
variables.description: The name of the company, laboratory or person that provided the biological material

variables.name: COLLECTION_METHOD
variables.description: The protocol for collecting the primary tissue

variables.name: CULTURE_CONDITIONS
variables.description: The conditions under which the primary cell was cultured

variables.name: DIFFERENTIATION_METHOD
variables.description: The protocol used to differentiate the cell line

variables.name: DIFFERENTIATION_STAGE
variables.description: The stage in cell differentiation to which the cell line belongs

variables.name: IS_CELL_LINE
variables.description: Whether the subject is a cell line or donor

variables.name: MARKERS
variables.description: Markers used to isolate and identify the cell type

variables.name: MEDIUM
variables.description: The medium in which the cell line has been grown

variables.name: PASSAGE
variables.description: The number of times the cells have been re-plated and allowed to grow back to confluency or to some maximum density if using suspension cultures

variables.name: SAMPLE_TYPE
variables.description: Cell or tissue type or subtype of sample

tables.description: Subject ID, sample ID, sample source, source sample ID, and sample use variable obtained from participants involved in the "Integrated Epigenetic Maps of Human Embryonic, Extraembryonic and Adult Cells" project.

variables.name: SOURCE_SAMPLE_ID
variables.description: Sample ID used in the Source Repository

tables.description: Subject ID, sex, age, health of participant, and ethnicity of participants involved in the "Integrated Epigenetic Maps of Human Embryonic, Extraembryonic and Adult Cells" project.
Subject ID, consent group, cell line, source of subject, and subject source ID of participants involved in the "Integrated Epigenetic Maps of Human Embryonic, Extraembryonic and Adult Cells" project.

variables.name: CONSENT
variables.description: Consent group as determined by DAC

variables.name: SOURCE_SUBJECT_ID
variables.description: Subject ID used in the Source Repository

tables.description: Sample ID and GEO accession ID of participants involved in the "Integrated Epigenetic Maps of Human Embryonic, Extraembryonic and Adult Cells" project.
